name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Closed-trade widgets now obey the chart's visible range — only trades whose [entry_time, end_time] window overlaps `chart.getVisibleRange()` render as long_position widgets, with a 200ms debounced redraw on scroll/zoom. All trades from the broadcaster's 7-day window stay buffered in memory, so scrolling to last week's bars materializes those trades automatically. Without this, 300+ trades from a busy paper-trading week stacked on top of each other regardless of where the chart was scrolled. Earlier: full info-block visibility (Closed P&L / Qty / R:R / $-amounts / %-offsets); lotSize/accountSize/leverage/risk for correct qty math; bare-minimum create-call payload to avoid silent null returns; unified win/loss geometry; trail line at placed stop.
